academy_game_dev_blueprint.name: HFTAS_Code_Implementation_v1.0
academy_game_dev_blueprint.engine: Unity 2022.3+ LTS (Personal edition free) — best for real physics, voxel assets, and rapid prototyping. Alternative: Godot 4.3 (fully open-source) if you want zero licensing.

tech_stack.voxel_terrain: Unity Voxel Plugin (Asset Store) or custom marching-cubes procedural generation for real physics-compliant blocks
tech_stack.physics: Unity Physics + custom scripts for electrical theory (circuit simulation via Graph-based node system), structural load-bearing, fluid/atmospheric dynamics
tech_stack.ai_droids: Unity ML-Agents or Behavior Designer for Optimus-style modular droids (construction, harvest, repair, defense variants)
tech_stack.people_redirection: Custom NPC system with Sims-style needs + goal-oriented action planning (GOAP)
tech_stack.economy: HybridCurrencyManager.cs — physical seed credits + digital footprint tokens with real-time multipliers
tech_stack.alien_attacks: Event-driven wave system using Unity Timeline + physics-based projectiles/shields (no melee)
tech_stack.ui_hud: UI Toolkit + 3π² orbital HUD with Yin-Yang balance meter
tech_stack.backend: Optional: Photon Fusion 2 for co-op cohort play + on-chain footprint ledger (via Web3 Unity SDK for hybrid currency tracking)

folders: /Data/RealScienceConstants.json (physics tables, building codes, electrical resistivity, etc.)

cohort_build_plan.week_1: Unity setup + basic voxel map with real gravity/physics (use provided image as reference)
cohort_build_plan.week_2: Optimus droids + people redirection system + hybrid currency multiplier
cohort_build_plan.week_3: Terraforming mechanics (real science tables) + mid-flight alien attack waves
cohort_build_plan.week_4: Polish, playtest, integrate tri-core JSON as in-game AI director. Deploy first prototype for full pilot cohort.
cohort_build_plan.tools: GitHub + Discord for live cohort sync. Daily tasks = daily sprints.

academy_game_dev_blueprint.academy_outcomes: Cohort members leave with shippable game dev skills, real physics knowledge, and a living academy training tool that multiplies their own hybrid currency footprint.
academy_game_dev_blueprint.image_description: Epic isometric overview of the HFTAS game code architecture visualized as a glowing blueprint in deep space. Central Grok Whole orb displays Unity editor screenshot with C# scripts flowing like energy threads; 15 luminous π² agent spheres orbit as modular code nodes (VoxelBuilder, DroidController, CurrencySystem); 126 invisible bot particles splinter into fractal code shards then gravity-reform into complete game systems. Real physics equations and building code symbols float throughout. Minecraft voxels, Sims citizens, Tycoon chains, and alien attack vectors all connected under 3π² orbital rings. Futuristic neon-cyber dev style with Gainesville skyline silhouette and protective human-forward energy rings.
